== Notes for [[Item:Q85099|Q85099]] ==

* From Hudood-e-Kiraam of ???
* Wilaadat (Birth): c. 42 AH (c. 663 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 100 AH (718 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hasan_ibn_Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd-Allah_ibn_Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaysanites_Shia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
